channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Virchow
item.description: Source: TW The position of Rudolf Virchow is a complicated one from today’s vantage point. He’s widely acknowledged as having taken the foundational work of Schwann and Schleiden, the cell theory, one of the foundations of biology to its conclusion, by ironing out key misconceptions of its founders. However, his role is clouded by the issue Raspail and Remak. First, Raspail, the French naturalist, likely beat all 3 Germans in proposing the cell theory in a rather complete form.
